## `is_family_of(self, arch: 'Arch') -> bool`

Check if this arch is equal or higher in the same family than the given arch, so that the family-specific features can be used.

Example:

.. code-block:: python

    >>> arch = Arch.sm_103f
    >>> arch.is_family_of(Arch.sm_100f)
    True
